seoTitle: Hawks Nest vs Hay — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Hawks Nest and Hay. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Hawks Nest vs Hay: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Hawks Nest and Hay.
heading: Hawks Nest vs Hay — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Hawks Nest, New South Wales and Hay, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Hay has a lower overall climate risk score (39/100) compared to Hawks Nest (47/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Hawks Nest or Hay safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Hawks Nest has a flood risk score of 40/100, while Hay scores 42/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Hawks Nest scores 48/100 for bushfire risk. Hay scores 60/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Hawks Nest or Hay?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Hay has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 2.53% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
